summary_one_line_zh: 安全加固、轻量多模态与代码适配正在同时落地。
summary_one_line_en: Security hardening, lightweight multimodal, and code adaptation are landing together.

items.title_zh: OpenAI 上线 Lockdown 安全模式
items.why_zh: 个人账户级高风险防护开始产品化，提示面向 prompt injection/账号接管的默认安全边界在上移。
items.why_en: Consumer-account hardening is productized; baseline defenses against prompt injection and account takeover are moving up-stack.
items.so_what_zh: 审查你们的高权限 Agent 入口，补一层显式确认/降权开关。
items.so_what_en: Audit high-privilege agent entrypoints; add explicit confirmation and privilege-reduction toggles.

items.why_zh: 12B 级 any-to-any 模型继续下探，说明中端成本带的多模态部署门槛又降了一档。
items.why_en: A 12B any-to-any model lowers the deployment bar again for mid-cost multimodal workloads.
items.so_what_zh: 拿一条真实多模态链路做 A/B，评估是否能把现有大模型下放到 12B。
items.so_what_en: A/B one real multimodal flow and test whether you can downshift from your current larger model.

items.why_zh: 把仓库级上下文压进超网络生成 LoRA，直接对应代码模型在版本演化中的适配成本。
items.why_en: Hypernetwork-generated LoRA targets the real cost center: adapting code models as repositories evolve.
items.so_what_zh: 把你们的代码助手切到按仓库/分支生成适配器，别再只靠长上下文。
items.so_what_en: Prototype repo- or branch-specific adapters instead of relying only on longer context.
